path.description: File path relative to the worktree root.

line.description: 1-based line number; passed to editors that support `:line` jump syntax. `None` ⇒ open at file head.

column.description: 1-based column; only honoured by editors that support `:line:col` (VS Code, Cursor, Zed). Ignored otherwise.

editor_override.description: Override the daemon's editor resolution chain for this single call. Plain command name (`"code"`, `"cursor"`, `"zed"`, `"idea"`, …). `None` ⇒ use the daemon's standard chain.
